events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: Loop checks & wiring, instrumentation & controls. Field condition: missing surge protection on field side. Work is through testing/inspection step. Reference: loop drawings, ISA 5.1.

Missing surge protection on field side - if the loop drawing calls for surge protection, then this is non-compliant. Surge protection is critical for field instruments to protect against transients. This is a defect. The work has been tested/inspected but is missing a required component.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, potentially dangerous)
Risk: high (missing surge protection can lead to equipment damage, safety issues)
Work stage: tested/inspected
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 85-90% since it's through testing but missing surge protection
Value: 0 (no numeric reading asked)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: missing surge protection on field side per loop drawing
Actions: install surge protection device on field side, re-perform loop check
Rationale: loop drawing requires surge protection; missing it is non-compliant and risks damage
References: loop drawings, ISA 5.1
